description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly red and white color scheme accented by black trim. The front panel includes a large rectangular screen area, a single joystick, and a few buttons, suggesting a single-player setup. Below the control panel, there is a coin door with visible slots and a lock, typical of traditional arcade machines. The side panels are decorated with bold white stripes and a stylized logo or graphic near the top, adding a retro aesthetic. The top section houses a marquee area with matching artwork, while the rear is plain black with ventilation or access panels. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and is designed to be both visually striking and durable for public use.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with red and white graphics, a single joystick control panel, and a coin door, featuring bold side stripes and a marquee artwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen area, single joystick, control buttons, coin door, and marquee artwork.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red panel with white stripes and a logo near the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel with two access or ventilation slots and no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching red and white stripes and the same logo near the top.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat rectangular, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and a few buttons, spaced for comfortable access, with a simple color scheme matching the cabinet
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, featuring a stylized logo or text in white on a red background, matching the side panel graphics and overall retro theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Bold white stripes on a red background with a stylized logo or graphic near the top; retro and visually striking
